name: lab-trend-panel
title: Lab Trend Panel
description: LabResultRows with a leading trend sparkline and a popover of recent dated values.
clinicalNotes: For slow-moving analytes (eGFR, HbA1c) the trend direction carries more clinical meaning than a single in/out-of-range flag, so each row leads with a sparkline shaded against its own reference range; the popover lists the recent dated values behind it. The sparkline exposes an auto-generated text trend summary (direction, last value, count) to screen readers, so the trend is never conveyed by shape alone, and the numeric value + flag from LabResultRow remain the primary readout. LabTrendRow accepts every LabResultRowProp, so `critical` flags and reference ranges behave exactly as in lab-result.
notes: medcn-original. Composes lab-result (LabResultRow + LabPanel) + trend-sparkline + popover; LabTrendRow is the per-analyte unit.
